# 🩺 NeuroScan AI - COVID-19 Chest X-Ray Classifier

A production-ready AI healthcare application that analyzes Chest X-Rays to detect COVID-19. It uses a **Deep Learning Model (TensorFlow/Keras)** to generate real-time predictions with confidence scores and automatically compiles professional **Clinical PDF Reports** for diagnostic use.

## ✨ Features

* Drag-and-drop X-Ray image upload
* Real-time COVID-19 detection and confidence scoring
* Auto-generated, downloadable clinical PDF reports with probability charts
* Live system analytics (total scans, average confidence, latency)
* Premium, responsive Glassmorphism UI with Dark/Light mode

## ⚙️ Working Pipeline

X-Ray Upload → FastAPI Backend → TensorFlow Inference → Probability Calculation → PDF Report Generation → Results Dashboard

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* Python
* FastAPI
* HTML
* CSS
* Vanilla JavaScript
* TensorFlow & Keras
* NumPy & Pillow
* FPDF2 & Matplotlib

https://covid19-xray-ui.onrender.com
